description: Educational content explaining coffee production journey, roasting science, and flavor development process using Arabic narrative and visual storytelling.
structural_recipe: Present coffee as a multi-stage process with emphasis on craftsmanship. Use Arabic poetic language (قهوة تمر برحلة طويلة) to frame coffee journey. Show roasting temperatures, timing, and flavor development correlation. Include visual journey from bean to cup. Structure as educational narrative with emoji accents. Address audience directly with conversational tone (ي addressing marker).
why_it_works: Saudi audience values craftsmanship, quality, and educational content that positions products as premium and scientifically superior. Coffee holds cultural significance in Saudi society, making educational framing prestigious. Poetic Arabic presentation elevates commodity to artisanal status. Direct address and sensory details (taste, temperature, aroma) create engagement.
transplantation_caveats: Requires fluent Arabic with poetic/elevated language register - direct translation underperforms
Coffee education appeals primarily in premium F&B segment; mass market may prefer entertainment-focused content
Educational depth assumes audience values technical knowledge; oversimplification risks perceived inauthenticity
cultural_constraints: Coffee deeply embedded in Saudi culture; educational framing must respect traditional significance
Avoid scientific language that overshadows cultural/social dimensions of coffee consumption
